title: Privacy Principles Quick Tour — NZ Privacy Act 2020
description: Overview of the 13 privacy principles from the New Zealand Privacy Act 2020 governing collection, handling, and use of personal information. Covers lawful purpose, transparency, security, access rights, data accuracy, retention, use limitations, and cross-border transfer requirements.
